title: Imersive Bucket
description: "Imersive Bucket" is a texture pack that transforms your Minecraft experience by making all buckets 3D, enhancing their appearance and adding a new level of immersion to the game.
body:
![Imersive Bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c851e07844c3ae6143561a4f04b8291ba4d629b1.png)
 
**Optifine Required**
 

"Imersive Bucket" is a texture pack that transforms your Minecraft experience by making all buckets 3D, enhancing their appearance and adding a new level of immersion to the game.

Bring a new dimension to your Minecraft world with the "Imersive Bucket" texture pack! This pack elevates the visual experience of buckets by converting them into stunning 3D models. Whether you're carrying water, lava, milk, or even your favorite aquatic friends, each bucket has been meticulously crafted to look more realistic and engaging.

 

Features:


- Empty Bucket: A sleek, newly modeled empty bucket.
- Water Bucket: Dive into the details with a beautifully rendered water-filled bucket.
- Lava Bucket: Feel the heat with a fiery 3D lava bucket.
- Powder Snow Bucket: Experience the chilly touch of a bucket filled with powder snow.
- Milk Bucket: Enjoy the creamy, 3D look of a milk-filled bucket.
- Tropical Fish Bucket: Delight in the vibrant colors of a tropical fish swimming in a bucket.
- Cod Bucket: See the cod in all its glory inside a 3D bucket.
- Salmon Bucket: Witness the salmon’s sleek, dynamic form in a beautifully detailed bucket.
- Pufferfish Bucket: Be careful! The 3D pufferfish bucket is spikier and more lifelike than ever.
- Tadpole Bucket: Observe the tiny tadpole with enhanced detail.
- Axolotl Bucket: Carry your adorable axolotl in a 3D bucket that brings out its charm.

 

Upgrade your game’s aesthetics with "Imersive Bucket" and enjoy a more visually pleasing and immersive Minecraft experience. Download now and transform the mundane into the extraordinary!

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
